summary: Tested edit memorization records feature and student progress button rename. Backend PUT /api/memorization-progress/{progress_id} endpoint works correctly with proper access control (403 for students, 401 for unauthenticated). Frontend button text changed from 'تقدمي' to 'سجل حفظي'. StudentProgress component shows full memorization history with edit buttons only visible in teacher view. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend lint passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Only teachers can edit (role check at line 2795-2796)
VERIFIED: last_edited_by, last_edited_by_name, last_edited_at fields stored (lines 2821-2823)
VERIFIED: StudentDashboard button text changed to 'سجل حفظي' (line 257)
VERIFIED: StudentProgress shows full progress_log with teacher names
VERIFIED: Edit pencil button only visible when isTeacherView=true (line 131-139)
VERIFIED: StudentProfileModal has edit pencil on each progress_log entry (line 331)
VERIFIED: EditMemorizationDialog has all required data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: EditMemorizationDialog pre-fills entry data and calls PUT API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit memorization feature fully implemented. Backend PUT endpoint validates surah/ayah and stores edit metadata. Frontend EditMemorizationDialog component works with StudentProgress (isTeacherView=true) and StudentProfileModal. Student view correctly hides edit buttons. Button renamed from 'تقدمي' to 'سجل حفظي'. Teacher authentication (Google OAuth) required to fully test edit functionality in browser.

verified_features.backend_ayah_validation: PASSED - Validates from_ayah and to_ayah range
verified_features.frontend_button_rename: PASSED - Button text changed to 'سجل حفظي'
verified_features.frontend_progress_history: PASSED - Shows full progress_log with teacher names
verified_features.frontend_edit_teacher_only: PASSED - Edit buttons only visible when isTeacherView=true
verified_features.frontend_edit_dialog: PASSED - EditMemorizationDialog has all required fields and data-testid
verified_features.frontend_profile_edit: PASSED - StudentProfileModal has edit pencil on entries
